{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230259227E19D3E8A48604245FF9"}"},"total":1028},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6980983249544250127","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看的挺爽的，没什么恶心头疼阴谋论出现，感情线也单一，就是后面部分的逻辑有点莫名其妙，有一些情节我不知道他的意义是啥，因为突然出现，突然结束~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625386827,"group_id":"6889001857415384072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+ffgbyr60s6udtU3ofw4A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/772045d31e55435a94a07752c2489160~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791804&x-signature=0ZYgFRc9gomhN7WMg7%2BZqLsyrDU%3D","user_id":"103721700271","user_name":"圆滚滚的栗子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103721700271","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1712613043,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6889001857415384072","book_info":{"abstract":"曾宇穿越平行世界，经历人生最重要的一场大考，觉醒了超级学霸系统。
考语文，因为时间不够，随手用甲骨文写了一篇诗歌，连专家都震惊了！
考数学，微积分、复变函数解题，阅卷老师直呼流弊！
考物理，二十分钟做完，还抽空给阅卷老师出了道题，引起了教授们的广泛讨论。
考试结束，张宇火了。
所有做了的题全部满分！
以660的考分碾压735的状元，被各大高校争抢。
你以为这就结束了？
错，这才是开始！
